title: Kilner Square Clip Top Spice Jar - 70ml
features: KEEP FOOD FRESH LONGER: The airtight rubber seal locks in freshness, ensuring your spices stay flavourful for longer periods
VERSATILE STORAGE: Perfect for storing a variety of dry foods such as rice, sugar, flour, and lentils
STYLISH DESIGN: The traditional Kilner logo adds a touch of elegance to your pantry or kitchen countertop
EASY TO IDENTIFY: The transparent design allows for quick and easy identification of the contents inside the jar
CONVENIENT ACCESS: The clip-top lid provides effortless opening and closing for easy access to your spices
description: Product Description Elevate your pantry organisation with the Kilner Square Clip Top Spice Jar. This 70ml glass jar is the perfect addition to any home or professional kitchen, providing a stylish and practical solution for storing your favourite herbs, spices, and dry ingredients. Featuring an airtight rubber seal, this jar ensures that your ingredients stay fresh and flavourful for longer periods of time. Say goodbye to stale spices and hello to enhanced flavours in your culinary creations. The clip-top lid allows for easy opening and closing, making accessing your spices a breeze during busy cooking sessions. With its transparent design, you can easily identify the contents of each jar without having to open it. No more rummaging through cluttered cabinets in search of the right spice. The traditional Kilner logo adds a touch of nostalgia and charm to your kitchen decor - bringing back memories of timeless kitchens. Not only is this spice jar practical and visually appealing, but it's also versatile. Perfect for storing a wide range of dry foods such as rice, sugar, flour, lentils - you name it. Its compact 70ml capacity makes it ideal for small quantities or specialty spices that you use less frequently. Box Contains 1 x Kilner Clip Top Spice Jar 70 ml
